title: Don't use Fable 5 in Claude… do this instead
summary: David Ondrej advises against using Fable 5 in Claude and presents an alternative approach. The content suggests Fable 5 has some limitations when used with Claude.
writeup: David Ondrej argues against using Fable 5 in Claude and lays out an alternative approach instead. The framing implies Fable 5 carries limitations when paired with Claude, which is the reason the video steers toward a different method. The summary does not specify what those limitations are or what the recommended alternative entails.
